plot outline: Stephanie, a widowed mother, who also runs a cooking vlog, befriends Emily, an upper-class secretive woman whose child goes to same elementary school as of Stephanie's. Suddenly Emily goes missing and Stephanie starts investigating, only to find dark secrets, which changes the life of Stephanie forever.
title: A Simple Favor
akas: A Simple Favour (New Zealand, English title)

other companies.name: Alliance of Canadian Cinema, Television and Radio Artists (ACTRA)
